name: White Chocolate Macadamia Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flour plus 2 teaspoons Baking soda
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Lightly butter two cookie sheets and set aside.
3. With an electric mixer, cream together the butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar at medium speed until light, about 3 minutes.
4. Add the Egg and Vanilla extract and mix until well blended.
5. Sift together the Flour, Baking soda, and Salt.
6. Slowly add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Stir in the white chocolate chunks and chopped Macadamia nuts.
7. Roll tablespoonfuls of dough into balls and place on the prepared baking sheets.
8. Gently flatten each ball with your hands.
9. Bake until lightly golden, about 12 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and let cool.
Makes about 30 cookies (2 inches in diameter).
